message.content:
PASS  
The pagination bar at the bottom of the "Étudiants" table includes:  
- A range indicator showing "Affichage de 1 à 5 sur 8 éléments" (displaying 1 to 5 of 8 items).  
- A "Lignes:" page size selector (currently set to 5).  
- Navigation buttons: first page (<<), previous (<), page number buttons (1 highlighted in emerald/green as active, 2), next (>), and last (>>).
